title: ExperimentSpec v1
description: Domain-neutral parent experiment contract: reproducible experiment plan bridging governance intake to execution layer.

experiment_version.description: Monotonically increasing version. Start at 1. Increment on any field change after initial commit.

hypothesis_id.description: Reference to EdgeHypothesisRegistry.hypothesis_id. Hypothesis must exist with status proposed or approved_for_next_stage.

data_manifest_refs.description: List of DataManifest.data_manifest_id values in scope for this experiment.

experiment_family.description: Human-readable family label for grouping related experiments.

model_assessment_ref.description: Reference to a ModelAssessmentSpec by ID. Optional in ExperimentSpec v1. The ModelAssessmentSpec remains the canonical assessment artifact; ExperimentSpec may reference an expected or planned assessment but does not approve or finalize it.

model_assessment_inline.description: Inline ModelAssessmentSpec content. Optional in ExperimentSpec v1. Same constraints as model_assessment_ref.

decision_timestamp_policy.description: Policy for determining the primary decision timestamp. Controls anti-lookahead boundary.

timestamp_ref.description: Reference to the timestamp field used as the decision point.

feature_cutoff_policy.description: Policy for determining the feature/data cutoff timestamp.

timestamp_ref.description: Reference to the timestamp field used as the cutoff.

offset_direction.description: Direction of offset relative to the decision timestamp.

entry_rule_ref.description: Reference URI to the entry rule definition. Abstract — resolved by domain profile.

exit_rule_ref.description: Reference URI to the exit rule definition. Abstract — resolved by domain profile.

outcome_spec_ref.description: Reference to OutcomeSpec (future). Reserved for forward compatibility.

outcome_spec_inline.description: Inline OutcomeSpec content. Reserved for forward compatibility.

instrument_universe_ref.description: Reference to InstrumentUniverseSpec (future). Reserved for forward compatibility.

instrument_universe_inline.description: Inline InstrumentUniverseSpec content. Reserved for forward compatibility.

risk_profile_ref.description: Reference URI to the risk profile. Abstract — resolved by domain profile.

trial_generation_mode.description: How trials are generated under this experiment.

allowed_trial_lanes.description: Permitted source_lane values for TrialLedger entries generated under this experiment. Must be a non-empty subset of {theory_first, exploratory_anomaly, post_hoc_theory, confirmatory}.

prohibited_modes.description: Stop-rule enforcement object. Each field must be absent or false. If a field is present, it must be false.

autonomous_search.description: Must be absent or false. No automated exploration of the strategy space without pre-declared SearchSpaceManifest and human review.

bayesian_optimization.description: Must be absent or false. No automated hyperparameter optimization.

genetic_programming.description: Must be absent or false. No evolutionary algorithm-driven strategy generation.

automated_promotion.description: Must be absent or false. No automatic advancement of hypotheses to next stage.

automated_registry_mutation.description: Must be absent or false. No automatic changes to EdgeHypothesisRegistry records.

live_trading.description: Must be absent or false. No real-money execution under any circumstances.

production_execution.description: Must be absent or false. No simulated production with real market impact.

gcru_integration.description: Must be absent or false. No connection to live market data feeds, execution systems, or risk management without a separate governance design.

reviewer.description: Human reviewer metadata for this experiment declaration. Must be an object with at minimum a name field.
